title: Section Registrations Grade Options
description: The grading options for the section registration.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the section registration.

section.title: Section
section.description: An instance of a course for which a person has registered.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Section.

sectionGradability.title: Section Gradability
sectionGradability.description: An indicator whether the section is gradable.

studentGradeScheme.title: Student Grade Scheme
studentGradeScheme.description: The grading scheme used to award the student their grade for the section.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The grading scheme used to award the student their grade for the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the grading scheme.

gradeStatus.title: Grade Status
gradeStatus.description: An indicator whether the student has a verified grade or the section registration.

grades.title: Grades
grades.description: The grade options associated with the section registration.

grade.title: Grade
grade.description: The grade that may be awarded to the student by the instructor.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grade.

incompleteGradeDetails.title: Incomplete Grade Details
incompleteGradeDetails.description: The incomplete grade details associated with the grade.

finalGradeDefault.title: Final Grade Default
finalGradeDefault.description: The default final grade to be assigned to this section registration when extension date is passed.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Final Grade Default.

finalGradeDefaultOverridability.title: Final Grade Default Overridability
finalGradeDefaultOverridability.description: An indicator whether the instructor may override the default final grade.

extensionDateDefault.title: Extension Date Default
extensionDateDefault.description: The default extension date associated with the incomplete grade.

lastDateOfAttendanceRequiredness.title: Last Date Of Attendance Requiredness
lastDateOfAttendanceRequiredness.description: An indicator whether the last date of attendance is required for the grade.
